name: Kawamatsu (Reprint)
effect_text: [When Attacking] You may trash 2 cards from your hand: Add up to 1 of your Characters with 0 power to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-up.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP06 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
